diff:
diff --git a/.markdownlint-rules/sdk-version-note.js b/.markdownlint-rules/sdk-version-note.js
+new file: custom markdownlint rule that errors when a doc mentions an SDK version without a restore.sh/restore.cmd note
diff --git a/.markdownlint.json b/.markdownlint.json
+    "customRules": ["./.markdownlint-rules/sdk-version-note.js"],
diff --git a/global.json b/global.json
+    "rollForward": "latestFeature",
+    "allowPrerelease": true,

exploration_log.aha_moment: markdownlint's `customRules` property accepts an array of relative paths to JavaScript rule modules — this is the standard way to add custom enforcement rules without modifying the tool itself.
exploration_log.hindsight: Could have looked at the markdownlint documentation to confirm the `customRules` property name before implementing.

alternatives: Add a comment-only note in .markdownlint.json about the rule
Create a separate lint script that grep-checks docs
key_decisions.decision: Create a .markdownlint-rules/sdk-version-note.js custom rule module and reference it via customRules
key_decisions.reasoning: The task explicitly says 'add a rule'; a real markdownlint custom rule module is the proper enforcement mechanism

search_sequence.reasoning: Primary file to modify per task description
search_sequence.result: Found sdk.version with no rollForward or allowPrerelease; added both

search_sequence.reasoning: Need to add the custom rule reference
search_sequence.result: Standard markdownlint config; added customRules array pointing to the new rule file

queries.query_text: Add rollForward latestFeature and allowPrerelease to global.json sdk, add custom markdownlint rule sdk-version-note to .markdownlint.json for SDK version documentation enforcement

solve_notes: Added `rollForward: "latestFeature"` and `allowPrerelease: true` to the `sdk` object in `global.json` to allow compatible minor SDK versions. Created a custom markdownlint rule module at `.markdownlint-rules/sdk-version-note.js` that checks documentation files for SDK version references without a corresponding `restore.sh`/`restore.cmd` note. Registered the custom rule in `.markdownlint.json` via the `customRules` property.
task_text: The `global.json` at the repo root pins the SDK to a specific preview version (`11.0.100-preview.1.26104.118`) using an exact version match with no `rollForward` policy. Contributors with a compatible but not identical SDK installed cannot build locally without running `restore.sh` / `restore.cmd` first. Update `global.json` to add a `rollForward` policy of `latestFeature` under the `sdk` object so that compatible minor SDK versions are accepted, and add `allowPrerelease: true` to permit preview SDKs. Also update `.markdownlint.json` to add a rule enforcing that any documentation file referencing a specific SDK version includes a note directing users to run `restore.sh` / `restore.cmd` to bootstrap the required SDK. Touches `global.json` and `.markdownlint.json`.

tier_difference_reasoning: The minimum set covers all edited artifacts. No additional context is needed; global.json and .markdownlint.json are standalone config files that don't require reading other files to implement correctly.
